feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Looking for a Japanese porn video
entry.content: There's a specific Japanese brother-sister video I'm looking for The sister is a house cleaner for her brother, she wakes up to him fucking her. There's a flashback where she's getting drunk, he talks about paying hookers for sex, talks about being broke. Then she suggests him paying her for sex Don't know the name of the woman but she's got nice titties Can't find it for the life of me

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Beyond misogyny
entry.content: like clockwork, everytime I’ve ever interacted with the subspecies of a pathetic excuse for an opposite gender, they’ve tried to get one over on me. It is a known fact to me, you lack an attention span, and with this, your word means nothing but a mere joke in the best case scenario. I regret ever trying to enlighten your kind on the finer things in life. But I’m elated to say I know better at this point, and it feels better to look down on you and laugh at you for even trying in the first place

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It's expected for games to cost a bit more now (but they don't actually when you…
entry.content: It's expected for games to cost a bit more now (but they don't actually when you account for inflation) since they're way longer and more complex than they were in the past. Also it's natural for the industry to move away from the physical media since digital fits the business model of video games (and movies) much better - you don't own a game/movie - since you haven't paid for its 100-million dollar budget. You own a (limited) license to play/watch it. That's it. Having the above in mind, as f

entry.title: /o/ Auto: T4 Volkswagen Transporter probelm
entry.content: I have a '92 T4 with the 2.4 liter AAB engine. I've never seen the temp warning or the glow plug lights light up when starting the car. I thought it was normal but here's a screenshot from a youtube video, showing that they should light up. Any idea why mine are dead? I even took out the whole instrument panel and replaced the LEDs. Nothing.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Old Gramophone to Modern Kit?
entry.content: I got this cool old gramophone thing. Hand cranked, no electricity, awesome. Came with a dozen shellac records from the 20s to 40s. But obviously being a steel tip one it can't play vinyls, modern ones. Is there some conversion kit, like a weight and a diamond tipi can change them around with? Or would I have to electrify it (tonearm, speakers, modern control turntable, etc?) and if so how should I go about that? Disassemble a modern one and swap the parts, wire up speakers? Or are there "kits"

entry.title: /b/ Random: I never understood being fat, it's so expensive. Not only do you have to buy 400…
entry.content: I never understood being fat, it's so expensive. Not only do you have to buy 4000 calories of food a day, which is like 3 times the amount a normal person eats, but each item of your clothing costs at least 10% more. I started working for a clothing company and some guy requested custom shirts, I told him that 2XL would cost me $5/shirt more and he lost his shit.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The PS6 is priced at 1,000 USD
entry.content: >OK, let’s assume I’d accept such a ridiculous price (which I wouldn’t). What sort of exclusive game would actually tempt me to buy a PS6? I wouldn’t buy a PS6 just for God of War: Laundry. Uncharted 5? (Naughty Dog doesn’t have the time.) Horizon 3? (Not buying it) Spider-Man 3 (Not buying it) Bloodborne Remastered (Unlikely) I can’t think of any exclusive games Sony might release that would entice players to buy a PS6.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >dude... Video Games are real art, just take a look at the kino stories Rockstar…
entry.content: >dude... Video Games are real art, just take a look at the kino stories Rockstar writes >GTA VC is a Scarface ripoff >GTA 4 is a Brother 2 ripoff >RDR is a The Proposition ripoff >Max Payne 3 is a Elite Squad ripoff >GTA V is a Heat ripoff >RDR 2 is a Wild Bunch ripoff >GTA VI is a Place Beyond the Pines ripoff If the only thing the greatest "artists" in the gaming medium can do is ripoff movies, then gaming is not real art. Roger Ebert was right.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: There’s too much music
entry.content: “Spotify releases like 300 thousand songs a day," Tommy Lee said, leaning into the microphone on The Joe Rogan Experience. "Who the fuck is listening to all this music? Dude, I'm in the business. And if I can't keep up, how can a fan of music keep up?"

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Am I an elitist if I really don't like any pop music? It just seems compositiona…
entry.content: Am I an elitist if I really don't like any pop music? It just seems compositionally/structurally so much less interesting and less enjoyable than other kinds of music. Like everyone in this Twitter thread is replying saying this is an amazing, incredible masterpiece of a song. It's like a 4/10 to me at best. I'm not trying to be pretentious. I am not inherently against pop or against highly popular mainstream-appealing things. I just am not sure I've heard almost any pop song I've ever enjoyed.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2935
entry.content: >Trash Panda Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: "huh, this meal is missing, could use a little something. *gets Italo seasoning,…
entry.content: "huh, this meal is missing, could use a little something. *gets Italo seasoning, sprinkles on food* Oh, this is great, but it's still missing something. Oh! I know! *grabs greek seasoning, sprinkles some on* Perfect! Italo and Greek the perfect combination, now it tastes great!"

Oh... oh What you gonna do about me? Oh... oh What you gonna do about me? Your newspapers They just put you on They never tell you The whole story They just put your Young ideas down I was wonderin' could this be the end Of your pride and glory? Oh... oh What

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: So I realized I liked beautiful women. I have always just liked women that I lik…
entry.content: So I realized I liked beautiful women. I have always just liked women that I like, but I realized in particular I go after women who I think are the most beautiful without hesitation. Somehow, I think I have a chance it is weird. It is just nature or something I guess. I was looking at very beautiful women board and I thought most of the women posted looked mediocre and I did not find most of them very attractive. I thought maybe I am not as straight as I should be, but then I saw another pictur

entry.title: /t/ Torrents: Cant find Cartoon Network shows dubbed in japanese
entry.content: for years YEARS i have been searching for old cartoon network shows like Courage the cowardly dog, Samurai Jack etc, but dubbed in Japanese. about years ago there was a torrent i found but its gone now, no where to be found. i learned English from Cartoon network, and would love to learn Japanese. If anyone can find me the torren im even willing to pay you 20$ over revolut for it (i'm not rich, but it's just worth much much to me). the larger the show collection the better. i remember someone ha

entry.title: /g/ Technology: After recently being ARMpilled by ExplainingComputers and also using Mac device …
entry.content: After recently being ARMpilled by ExplainingComputers and also using Mac device (but unfortunately hating MacOS), I'm interested in daily driving one of these "enthusiast" Qualcomm SBCs for use with ARM Linux. Is this retarded? Pic related costs ~$250 and is pretty much top of the line as far as I can tell. Yes it's essentially the same performance as a high end smartphone from five years ago but as I don't game or video edit I don't feel the need for a ton of power. I am much more interested in

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is this shit so insanely difficult to get working correctly on a NAS? I've s…
entry.content: Why is this shit so insanely difficult to get working correctly on a NAS? I've spent 2 hours now just trying to set up Recyclarr on my Synology NAS it's basically impossible. Permissions errors everywhere despite the fact that folder permissions are set correctly, and AI just gives me fake hallucinated fixes that don't actually work. Meanwhile anything from the Synology package center just works perfectly with a one click install. Also, why the fuck do I even need yet another service running jus

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Physical has been dead for years
entry.content: If gabe died and steam started fucking everyone over and we all lost our game libraries, everyone would pirate from there on out. If game platforms actually started using the "you dont actually own your games, you license them" clause, the gaming industry would die over night. It would break everyones shackles and they would start pirating. Steam could never just take your games unless they are trying to ruin their entire business. There are a few games here and there that will fuck you over but
